name: Pork Tenderloin Perfection
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the soy sauce, catsup, and garlic powder.
2. Place one pork tenderloin in a plastic bag set in a shallow dish. Pour the soy sauce mixture over the meat.
3. Turn the meat to coat all sides. Seal the bag tightly.
4. Marinate the meat in the refrigerator for 24 hours, turning occasionally.
5. Remove the meat from the marinade and discard the marinade.
6. Place the tenderloin on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
7. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the meat.
8. Roast uncovered at 325°F until the thermometer reads 160°F, about 45-60 minutes.
9. Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds onto a piece of foil.
10. Carefully roll the tenderloin in the sesame seeds.
11. Cut into thin slices and serve with Chinese hot mustard.
